property.description: Attack Detection for UC HES in DYNABIC Project

event.boolean_expression: ( (#em_predict_attack(dynabic_hes_data.timestamp, dynabic_hes_data.protocol, dynabic_hes_data.src_ip, dynabic_hes_data.dst_ip, dynabic_hes_data.src_port, dynabic_hes_data.dst_port, dynabic_hes_data.length, dynabic_hes_data.tcp_flags, dynabic_hes_data.payload_size ) == 1 ) )
